content.en:
"Who?"

The Ghost Flame God swept his senses and soon discovered a spaceship beyond Earth.

At this moment, twelve people were flying down from the spaceship.

In the blink of an eye, these twelve people appeared in front of the Ghost Flame God.

Ye Tian is an emperor-level and a native of the earth, so he is not limited by the earth.

And the strength of other great gods is not weak, so they can naturally rely on their own strength to resist the power of the earth world, and Jin Chen Zhenjun is not to mention, he is a galaxy-level powerhouse, if he even manages to enter the earth world, it will be nonsense.

The earth is just an ordinary high-level planetary world, which is very common in the universe, unless Ye Tian transforms the earth one day and forcibly changes the rules, maybe the powerhouses above the god level and even galaxy-level and galaxy-level powerhouses will not be able to enter the earth.

But now, the power of the earth's world can't expel powerhouses above the great god level.

"You ......"

The Great God of Ghost Yan stared at Ye Tian, suddenly a little familiar, and then looked at the others, his expression was extremely solemn.

"Husband!"

The Moon Emperor rushed towards Ye Tian and crashed into Ye Tian's arms at once.

Originally, Jin Chen Zhenjun wanted to stop the Moon Emperor from coming, after all, his responsibility was to protect Ye Tian's safety, so naturally he would not let others easily approach Ye Tian, but Ye Tian told the Moon Emperor the identity in time, and Jin Chen Zhenjun did not stop it.

Ye Tian hugged the Moon Emperor and said, "I'm back!"

"You are Ye Tian, the son of the universe!"

The Ghost Flame God stared at Ye Tian in shock.

He was a little strange, where did Ye Tian find so many great god-level powerhouses, and the one who led him seemed to be ......

If it was usual, he would definitely leave and dare not compete with Ye Tian, but this time he was reluctant to leave.

"Ye Tian, I want to buy the Kunlun Mountains on the earth, at what price, you say!"

Oniyan Great Shinto.

Ye Tian's sharp eyes stared at the Ghost Flame God, and said coldly: "You still want to buy the Kunlun Mountain Range? I heard all your words just now, and the people who dare to threaten me are very arrogant! Don't you know that the earth is my territory? You dare to trespass in without permission!"

"I'm a great god, but I'm not subject to the laws of the Rilun Empire, the so-called territory is just a joke, you take it seriously!"

He is a god-level powerhouse, and he can be ranked at the forefront of the galaxy's god-level, how powerful he is.

Originally, he wanted to directly assign the earth to his name, but those forces of Yinyuxing didn't do it.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's identity as the son of the universe, he would have already snatched the earth.

But scruples are one thing, and it doesn't mean that he will admit it.

No matter how powerful Ye Tian was, he was only an emperor.

"Give you a choice, apologize right away, or die!"

Ye Tian threatened.

"You dare to threaten me? I don't know where you got the powerhouse, but this is the galaxy, these people are not the powerhouses of the galaxy, right? If you dare to let them make a move, I can also gather my friends, you may not be able to get me!" said the Ghost Flame God without flinching.

"Jin Chen Zhenjun, kill him!"

Ye Tian ordered, too lazy to continue talking nonsense.

"Yes, Your Highness Wanfa!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun had long hidden his aura after listening to Ye Tian's orders before, but now that he was no longer hiding, the aura belonging to a galaxy-level powerhouse was exposed.

Rumble!!!!

Heaven and earth seem to change color, and even the power of the earth world has begun to transform.

No matter how powerful a galaxy-level powerhouse is, he can destroy the earth with a single thought, but it is not difficult to drag the sun, and Jinchen Zhenjun is a galaxy-level powerhouse cultivated by the supreme hall of the human race, ranking in the galaxy-level peak realm, and his strength is stronger than many galaxy-level powerhouses in the domain.

In the Milky Way, there are not many galaxy-level powerhouses, and most of them are relatively weak galaxy-level powerhouses.

It can be said that Jinchen Zhenjun is almost invincible in the galaxy.

"Galactic level powerhouse, how can you really be a galaxy-level powerhouse!! no, you can't kill me, I am the Great Elder of the Silver Emperor Star Ghost God Sect, and our Ghost God Sect also has a galaxy-level ancestor!!"

The Great God of Ghost Yan tried to move out of the Ghost God Sect to make Jinchen Zhenjun jealous.

However, he didn't know the identity of Jin Chen Zhenjun at all.

Not to mention that the Ghost God Sect only has one galaxy-level ancestor, even if the Ghost God Sect has galaxy-level power, what if it can still compete with the supreme hall of the human race?

I saw Jin Chen Zhenjun covering it with one palm, and the Ghost Flame God couldn't even resist at all, and directly turned into ashes.

And the three Tianjiao and the emperor level behind the Ghost Flame God are fine, Jinchen Zhenjun knows that the universe protects Tianjiao, even if they kill Tianjiao, they only need to pay a little price, but the punishment of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race for wanton killing Tianjiao is very heavy.

The strong people above the god level are not allowed to kill Tianjiao, even if Tianjiao offends them, they can only be expelled, not killed.

This is the protection of the Terran high-level for the Tianjiao!

He also didn't know how many Tianjiao were among these emperors, so he didn't attack them directly, so as not to kill the wrong one.

Then.

When the three Tianjiao saw that the Ghost Yan Great God was dead, they really panicked, and immediately thought of their identity, and hurriedly said: "I am Tianjiao, you can't kill me!"

At this time, they were very glad that they were a Tianjiao, otherwise they would probably die at the hands of these galaxy-level powerhouses like the Ghost Flame God.

"Your Highness, these people are Tianjiao, it's inconvenient for me to make a move!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun said.

"It's inconvenient for you to make a move, I'll come personally!"

Ye Tian's fingers flicked slightly, and the ethereal spirit golden threads shrouded these emperor-level.

"No !!"

The three Tianjiao and the other emperors were terrified and tried to escape.

However!

Puff puff!!!

None of these emperors escaped, and all of them were killed by the Void Spirit Golden Thread.

The powerhouses above the god level did not dare to kill Tianjiao, but Ye Tian dared to kill.

He is the son of the emperor-level universe, and he is more noble than Tianjiao, so he can naturally kill Tianjiao.

At this time.

Those god-level and emperor-level people on the earth were stunned.

The earth has long been connected with the outside world, and they have a lot of knowledge, so they naturally know what the concept of the great god level is, and the great god of ghost flame can be ranked at the forefront of the galaxy!

When they knew the identity of the Ghost Flame God, they really didn't dare to provoke the Ghost Flame God, and even felt that the Moon Emperor couldn't compete with the Ghost Flame God at all.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian came back, and one of his subordinates easily killed the Ghost Yan God in seconds.

"The existence above the great god acts as a guard, hiss~~~~"

Everyone gasped, originally thinking that Ye Tian was already very powerful, but now they realized that they had completely underestimated Ye Tian.

"Let's all disperse!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

A group of emperor-level and a few god-level powerhouses left one after another.

As for the Moon Emperor and Ye Yu, they stayed.

"Yue'er, why did the Ghost Flame God come to Earth?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The Kunlun Mountains seem to have a treasure, the Ghost Flame God came early, and used the formation to envelop the Kunlun Mountains, and I don't know what is inside. The Moon Emperor shook his head and said.

Ye Tian looked into the depths of the Kunlun Mountain Range, and the Eye of Void was opened, but he couldn't see through the formation arranged by the Ghost Flame God.

After all, the Ghost Flame Great God was a top Great God, and if the arranged formation was seen through by Ye Tian so easily, it would not be worth mentioning.

"Jin Chen Zhenjun, you make a move to break these formations, remember not to destroy the Kunlun Mountain Range!"

Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes, Your Highness!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun made a move, and easily destroyed all the formations on the Kunlun Mountain Range.

At this time.

Ye Tian was very curious about what caused a strong person like the Ghost Flame Great God to covet it.

Although a Metaverse was born before the Kunlun Mountains, that Metaverse has long been shattered, could it be that there are other treasures?

When all the formations were broken, Ye Tian's divine sense continued to probe.

Soon, he discovers a huge crack that goes straight to the depths of the earth.

At the same time, a trace of pure chaotic vitality leaked out.

"Your Highness, there is a great opportunity under this mountain range!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun hurriedly spoke.

"Have you checked it out?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Jin Chen Zhenjun explained, "The subordinate divine sense has probed clearly, and below is a small World Tree, this World Tree is merging with a broken Chaos Ancient Well, once the fusion is successful, the World Tree will merge into the Chaos Ancient Tree, and the value of the Chaos Ancient Tree is even more precious than the World Tree." Such a small Chaos Ancient Tree is comparable to the entire net worth of a galaxy-level powerhouse, and most importantly, the World Tree and the Chaos Ancient Tree can open up the world and settle a world. If a god-level powerhouse obtains the World Tree or the World Ancient Tree, even if his cultivation does not reach the Hong level, he cannot be promoted to a galaxy-level powerhouse, but he can use the World Tree or the World Ancient Tree to open up the world in his body, and then he can use the power of the world to compete with the galaxy-level powerhouse. It is rumored that the Origin Realm is a world opened up by using a huge Chaos Ancient Tree, but this is a rumor, whether it is true or not, the subordinates don't know!"

"So that's the case, no wonder the Great God of Ghost Yan dares to take the risk of offending me and wants to occupy this place!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

If it was just an ordinary chance, it would be impossible for a character like the Ghost Flame God to offend a Son of the Universe, and even a galaxy-level powerhouse would give face to the Son of the Universe, but when it came to the great opportunity of his own strength, the Ghost Flame God naturally didn't want to give up.

It's a pity that he lost his life for his greed.

"Your Highness, if this World Tree is successfully promoted to the Chaos Ancient Tree, it will be of great use, when Your Highness is promoted to the god level in the future, you can use the Chaos Ancient Tree to open up the Chaos Ancient Realm in the dantian world, so that when Your Highness fights, the divine power will almost never be exhausted. Of course, I had only heard of this method, because when I was consulting ancient books, I knew that there was a Constant Ancient Highness who had done this. The Chaos Ancient Tree is very rare and immovable, and even the Supreme Hall of the Terran will find it difficult to provide you with a Chaos Ancient Tree!"

Jin Chen Zhenjun reminded.

"Jinchen Zhenjun, thank you for the reminder!"

Ye Tian said.

"Your Highness, this is what I should do!" Jin Chen Zhenjun hurriedly said.

Knowing that the Chaos Ancient Tree was so precious, Ye Tianrang took out the array plate and sealed it off again.
